TextView.android:text:
Hydration Tips & Benefits

1. Drink Morning Water
Start your day with a glass of water to jumpstart metabolism.

2. Carry a Reusable Bottle
Keep water with you at all times to encourage frequent sipping.

3. Set Drinking Reminders
Use alerts to ensure you meet your daily water intake goals.

4. Eat Water-Rich Foods
Consume cucumbers, watermelon, and oranges for extra hydration.

5. Limit Sugary Drinks
Focus on pure water instead of sodas or energy drinks.

6. Hydrate Before Exercise
Drink water 30 minutes before starting any physical activity.

7. Monitor Hydration Levels
Check your urine color; pale yellow usually indicates good hydration.

8. Drink Before Meals
Having water before eating can help with digestion and appetite control.

9. Infuse Your Water
Add lemon, mint, or berries to make plain water more refreshing.

10. Sip, Don't Gulp
Small frequent sips are better for absorption than drinking large amounts at once.
